items.title: The Perceptron: A Probabilistic Model for Information Storage and Organization in the Brain (Rosenblatt, 1958)
items.author: Frank Rosenblatt
items.note: Original perceptron learning rule and biological motivation — foundation for weighted sum + threshold models.

items.title: Perceptrons (Minsky & Papert, 1969)
items.author: Marvin Minsky, Seymour Papert
items.note: Formal analysis of linear separability limits, including XOR impossibility for single-layer threshold nets.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Linear models for classification, perceptron convergence, and connection to logistic regression.

items.title: scikit-learn Perceptron documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: API for linear perceptron classifier, eta0, max_iter, and coef_/intercept_ after training.
